Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC500 "ASYLUM-C500" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Asylum.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $C500 which: 1. Sets the pointer to beginning of the BASIC variable area ($2D/$2E) 2. Calls the init subroutine at $47B5 from the original game code 3. Executes the RUN command to start the game program
The loading screen is from the disk version.
Note: to dump the game, set a breakpoint at $02B8
